hero.headline: Revenue Problems Are Structural Before They Are Tactical.
hero.subhead: I'm Richard Norwood, PMP — a Guide who helps agencies and service businesses see where commercial friction lives, what to fix first, and how to move from scattered activity to an orchestrated system that grows with confidence.

ideology.title: The 5-Stage Revenue Journey
ideology.subtitle: A Unified Commercial Engine accompanies your buyer through a complete journey — from early awareness to long-term retention. Each stage is supported by Information Fusion and designed to keep the system coherent.

stages.title: Awareness
stages.subtitle: The Perimeter
stages.description: Buyers do substantial research before they ever speak with a seller. We help you become visible, relevant, and easy to understand at the discovery surfaces where the right buyers are already looking.

stages.title: Consideration
stages.subtitle: The Gateway
stages.description: Your digital presence needs to act like a guide, not a brochure. We build evaluation-ready structures that teach buyers how to think about the problem and assess whether your approach is the right fit.

stages.title: Decision
stages.subtitle: The Core
stages.description: Decision is about risk removal. We replace static pages with transparent proof, practical FAQs, and simple next steps that resolve buyer objections before they become blockers.

stages.title: Conversion
stages.subtitle: The Fulcrum
stages.description: Conversion is the center of the bowtie — where commitment becomes a clean start. We make sure quote-to-cash, onboarding, and internal ownership are clear so momentum is never lost at the handoff.

stages.title: Retention
stages.subtitle: The Right Side
stages.description: The sale is the midpoint, not the finish line. We help protect adoption, surface recovery needs early, and create responsible expansion — because if the right side is weak, the left side becomes more expensive.

about.title: The Guide
about.name: Richard Norwood, PMP
about.bio: Most consultants optimize isolated tactics. I help fix the system those tactics live inside. As a certified PMP, I merge delivery discipline with Revenue Architecture thinking to help businesses move from fragmented, hero-led growth toward a commercial system that is visible, governable, and easier to improve over time.
